title: Kawaii Happy Ghasts
description: Cute texture overhaul for the official Happy Ghast. Removes its clunky vanilla look and turns your flying pet into a blushing cutie!
body:
# 🌸 Cute Happy Ghast - The Ultimate Companion Upgrade!
![SO KAWAII](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c2c2a6e825d60421459fadfcf909c38d1cc03659.png)
With the recent updates, Minecraft finally gave us the **Happy Ghast**—the ultimate flying mount for you and your friends. But let's be honest, the default vanilla textures look a little bit clunky. 

**Want your new favorite pet to look absolutely adorable?** This lightweight resource pack redesigns the official Happy Ghast, giving it a complete aesthetic glow-up!

---

### ✨ Features:
* **Pure Kawaii Style:** Replaces the default Happy Ghast appearance with a blushing, smiling, and super-wholesome texture.
* **Perfect for Riding:** Your multiplayer flights and adventures on this 4-player mount will now look incredibly cute.
* **Vanilla+ Friendly:** Keeps the exact same model but polishes the vibes to match any aesthetic or cute modpack.

---

### 🛠 Compatibility & Requirements:
* Requires **Minecraft 1.21.6 or newer** (since that's when the Happy Ghast was officially added!).
* Compatible with all optimization mods like **Sodium, Iris, and Optifine**.
* Simply drag it into your resource packs folder and move it to the top of the list!

---

## 💖 Support the Project
If you love traveling on your newly beautified Happy Ghast, make sure to **Drop a Like** and follow EpicSUS for more cute vanilla tweaks!
